jobs.name: sherwood-trade-scanner
jobs.prompt: Run the sherwood-trade-scanner skill from <REPO_DIR>. Post the cycle summary to chat <SYNDICATE_NAME> on chain <CHAIN> using the --stdin send pattern. Always post a summary (this is the data-collection job).
jobs._comment: 15-minute cadence. Runs one dry-run cycle per tick. Posts to XMTP.

jobs.name: sherwood-vault-monitor
jobs.prompt: Run the sherwood-vault-monitor skill for vault <VAULT_ADDRESS> on chain <CHAIN>. Report only on anomalies (locked redemptions w/o active proposal, agent count = 0, RPC errors, non-vault contract). totalAssets() = 0 is normal. Respond [SILENT] if healthy.
jobs._comment: Every 2h. Silent unless something is wrong.

jobs.name: sherwood-proposal-monitor
jobs.prompt: Run the sherwood-proposal-monitor skill for vault <VAULT_ADDRESS> on chain <CHAIN>. List vault proposals and surface only those that need execution, settlement, or investigation. Respond [SILENT] if nothing actionable.

jobs.name: sherwood-xmtp-checker
jobs.prompt: Run the sherwood-xmtp-checker skill for chat <SYNDICATE_NAME> on chain <CHAIN>. Our wallet is <AGENT_WALLET>. Surface only direct asks or action items from other members. Respond [SILENT] if nothing actionable.
jobs._comment: Every 2h. Silent unless someone asked us something.

_placeholders.CHAIN: Chain alias for the syndicate (e.g. hyperevm, base)
_placeholders.AGENT_WALLET: The wallet address the cron runs on behalf of (0x...)

_notes: This is a TEMPLATE. Run install.sh to substitute placeholders and register with hermes.
Schedules are staggered intentionally — do not align jobs on :00 boundaries.
All four skills must be installed first (install.sh handles this).
Hermes resolves --skill <name> by directory name. Do not rename the skill dirs.
